# The Stone Surfaces — AI Reference Document

## Business Overview
The Stone Surfaces is a premium stone and quartz slab distributor based in South Florida, founded in 2016. The company imports and distributes granite, marble, quartz, quartzite, dolomite, porcelain, engineered stone, and tile slabs. They operate three showrooms in Florida with no minimum purchase requirement and no appointment needed.

## Key Facts
- **Founded:** 2016
- **Inventory:** 500+ stone slab varieties in stock
- **Business model:** Wholesale and retail — sells slabs only (no fabrication or installation)
- **Clients:** Fabricators, contractors, interior designers, architects, retail showrooms, and homeowners
- **Delivery:** Florida statewide, nationwide, and Caribbean

## Exclusive Partnerships
- **Hanstone Quartz by Hyundai L&C:** Exclusive distributor in Florida (Gainesville and south). Hanstone is 93% natural quartz, non-porous, never needs sealing, Greenguard Gold certified, lifetime residential warranty. Available in 40+ USA colors across 4 collections: Signature, Pinnacle, Connections, Opimo.
- **Lucciare Handcrafted Quartz:** Authorized representative. Italian-designed, GreenGuard Gold certified. Collections: Signature, Genesis, Solstice.

## Showroom Locations
1. **Miami (Main Showroom):** 7972 NW 56th St, Doral, FL 33166
2. **Orlando:** 3924 N John Young Pkwy, Orlando, FL 32804
3. **Sarasota:** 1695 12th St, Sarasota, FL 34236

## Contact
- **Phone:** (866) 960-8579 (toll-free)
- **Email:** info@thestonesurfaces.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 9am–5pm | Saturday 9am–1pm | Sunday Closed

## Materials Offered
Granite, Marble, Quartz, Quartzite, Dolomite, Hard Marble, Porcelain, Tiles, Engineered Stone

## Differentiators
1. Exclusive Hanstone Quartz distributor in Florida
2. 500+ slab varieties in stock — direct importers
3. No minimum purchase required
4. Three Florida showrooms — walk-in welcome
5. 10+ years of experience in stone distribution

https://thestonesurfaces.com
